common.footer_disclaimer_text: The calculators and tools on SmartCalcTools are provided for educational and mathematical estimation purposes only. The outputs generated by this site do not constitute a Fatwa (religious ruling), personalized Shariah advisory, or legal/financial advice. Please consult with a qualified Islamic scholar or your local Shariah board before making binding financial decisions.
common.footer_copyright: © 2026 SmartCalcTools. Free tools built for speed, privacy, and ethics.

home.hero_title: Free Islamic Finance & Pro Dev Tools
home.hero_subtitle: Professional-grade calculators built on Halal principles and offline-first developer utilities. Run entirely in your browser. No signups, no data tracking, 100% private.
home.why_halal_desc: We refuse to build tools for Riba (Usury). All our financial calculators follow Islamic guidelines.
home.why_private_desc: All calculations run locally in your browser. Your financial data never leaves your device.
home.why_speed_desc: No server roundtrips. Get instant results as you type with modern web technologies.

calculators.zakat_desc: Calculate your annual Zakat precisely according to Islamic guidelines based on Nisab.

calculators.roi_desc: Measure the profitability of your Halal investments and business ventures.
calculators.fire_desc: Calculate your path to Halal Financial Independence and Early Retirement.

dev_tools.prompt_desc: Craft optimized prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, and other AI models.

zakat.title: 🤲 Zakat Calculator
zakat.subtitle: Calculate your annual Zakat (2.5%) easily and accurately according to Islamic guidelines. No data is saved.
zakat.nisab_description: Based on current global market prices for 85 grams of Gold.
zakat.api_failed: ⚠️ Could not fetch live gold prices. Please enter the Nisab value manually based on 85g gold price in your local currency.
zakat.status_eligible: 🎉 Your net assets exceed the Nisab threshold. You are eligible to pay Zakat.
zakat.status_not_eligible: ℹ️ Your net assets are below the Nisab threshold. You are not required to pay Zakat.
zakat.note1: Nisab is the minimum amount of wealth a Muslim must possess for a full lunar year (Hawl) before Zakat becomes due.
zakat.note2: Nisab is equivalent to 85 grams of gold or 595 grams of silver. This calculator uses 85g of gold as the default standard.
zakat.note3: Zakat is calculated at 2.5% of your net cumulative wealth above the Nisab.
zakat.note4: Debts and immediate expenses should be deducted from your total assets before calculating Zakat.

qibla.title: Live Qibla Tracker 🕋
qibla.subtitle: 100% Native, Institutional-Grade Qibla Direction (Zero Third-Party Scripts).
qibla.location_permission_desc: We need access to your device's location to calculate the exact direction of the Kaaba mathematically.
qibla.geolocation_unsupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
qibla.permission_denied: Compass permission denied. Please allow it in settings.
qibla.location_denied: Location access denied. We need your location to calculate the Qibla.
qibla.no_sensors_desc: Your device does not have motion sensors (Gyroscope/Magnetometer).
qibla.direction_from_north: Exact Qibla Direction from True North
qibla.physical_compass_instruction: Use any physical compass and point it to the degree above.
qibla.turn_device: Turn your device to find the Qibla
